name: Blueberry Bread (Dak)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all dry ingredients to a bowl.
2. In a separate measuring cup, add the well-drained blueberries, 1/4 cup of retained juice, and enough water to make a total of 1-1/3 cups (approximately 1/4 cup water).
3. Select white bread on your machine and start the kneading cycle.
4. The dough will rise, and then you can bake it according to the machine's instructions.
Note: This recipe is attributed to "From Loafing It by DAK."
